full_text:
An update for ostree is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

OSTree is a tool for managing bootable, immutable, versioned file system trees.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): transient-ro hotfix ostree for 9.6 [rhel-10.0.z] (JIRA:RHEL-109401)
